project.name: Spark
project.description: A tiny scrap-metal robot discovers the last living flower in a junkyard. 15-second Pixar-style animated short.

story.name: Spark — Story Document
story.description: Narrative structure for the 15-second animated short.
story.logline: A tiny robot made of scrap metal discovers the last living flower in a vast junkyard — and chooses to protect it.
story.synopsis: In a sprawling junkyard under a grey sky, SPARK — a palm-sized robot assembled from discarded parts — stumbles upon a single green sprout pushing through the rust. Spark shields the flower from falling debris, sacrificing a piece of its own body to build a shelter, then sits beside it as a shaft of sunlight breaks through the clouds.

beats.name: Desolation
beats.description: Establish the bleak junkyard. Spark wanders aimlessly.

beats.name: Discovery
beats.description: Spark finds the flower. Its eye-light flickers with curiosity.

beats.name: Sacrifice
beats.description: Debris falls toward the flower. Spark detaches its own panel to shield it.

beats.name: Light
beats.description: Sunlight breaks through clouds. Spark sits beside the sheltered flower.

arcs.name: Spark's Arc
arcs.description: From aimless wandering to purposeful self-sacrifice.

script.name: Spark — Script
script.description: Full script with action lines and sound cues.

segments.actionDescription: Wide shot of a desolate junkyard stretching to the horizon under a leaden sky. Rusted cars, twisted metal, shattered appliances. A tiny glint of light moves among the debris — SPARK, a palm-sized robot cobbled from scrap, picks its way across the terrain on spindly legs.

Spark halts. Its single camera-lens eye pivots downward. Between two rusted gears, a tiny green sprout — impossibly alive — pushes through the dirt. Spark's eye-light shifts from dim amber to warm gold. It leans closer, head tilting.

A chunk of metal groans overhead and begins to fall toward the flower. Spark looks up, then at the sprout. Without hesitation, it reaches to its own torso, detaches a curved panel with a soft CLICK, and holds it above the flower as a shield. The debris CLANGS against the panel. Spark's body sparks from the exposed wiring.

Silence. A shaft of golden sunlight pierces the clouds, falling exactly on the flower and on Spark. The little robot settles beside the sprout, panel still held aloft, eye-light a steady, contented gold. FADE OUT.

directorInstructions.name: Spark — Director Notes
directorInstructions.visionStatement: This is a silent story told entirely through physicality and light. No dialogue, no narration. The emotional arc lives in Spark's eye-light color, body language, and the contrast between the grey world and the green sprout. Channel WALL-E's opening act — loneliness made beautiful — but compress it into 15 seconds of pure visual storytelling.
mustHaves: Spark's eye-light must shift color to signal emotion: dim amber (listless) → warm gold (curiosity) → bright gold (determination) → steady gold (peace)
The flower must be the only organic color in frame until the final sunbeam
The sacrifice moment (panel detach) must include a visible flinch — Spark feels it
Final shot: camera slowly pulls back to reveal the scale of the junkyard vs. the tiny shelter
mustAvoid: No dialogue or text of any kind
No anthropomorphic facial features on Spark — emotion comes from the eye-light and posture only
No other living creatures — Spark and the flower are alone
No saturated colors in the environment until the final sunbeam
directorInstructions.cameraLanguage: Start wide and impersonal. Push in as Spark finds the flower. Hold close during sacrifice. Pull back for the reveal. Rack focus from Spark to flower in the discovery shot.
directorInstructions.editingLanguage: No hard cuts. Slow dissolves for scene transitions. Let moments breathe.
directorInstructions.musicDirection: Solo piano, sparse. A single melodic phrase introduced in beat 2 that resolves in beat 4. Minor key shifting to major in the final three seconds.
directorInstructions.colorDirection: Desaturated blue-grey palette throughout. The flower is the only green. Spark's eye-light provides warm accent. Final sunbeam introduces warm gold to the environment for the first time.

characters.name: Spark
characters.description: A palm-sized robot made of scrap metal. Single camera-lens eye that glows with emotion-driven light.
characters.appearance: Roughly 15cm tall. Body assembled from mismatched scrap: a sardine tin torso, bottle-cap joints, wire legs, a single camera-lens eye mounted on a flexible neck. Surface is scratched, dented, showing age. Despite the junk origins, there is an endearing asymmetry — one leg slightly shorter, giving a distinctive waddle.

canonicalPromptFragments.fragment: tiny scrap-metal robot, sardine-tin torso, single camera-lens eye
Pixar-quality 3D rendering, subsurface scattering on metal, ray-traced reflections

environments.name: The Junkyard
environments.description: A vast, desolate landscape of rusted metal and discarded machinery under overcast skies.
environments.continuityNotes: The junkyard color palette is strictly desaturated blue-grey. No warm tones in the environment until the final sunbeam in scene 4.

canonicalPromptFragments.fragment: vast junkyard landscape, rusted metal, twisted scrap, overcast grey sky, desolate, no vegetation except one small sprout
Pixar-quality environment, volumetric fog, depth haze, photorealistic metal textures

props.name: The Flower
props.description: A single tiny green sprout — the only living thing in the junkyard.
props.continuityNotes: The sprout is approximately 5cm tall with two small leaves. It grows between two rusted gears. It is the ONLY source of green color in the entire piece until the environment is lit by the final sunbeam.

canonicalPromptFragments.fragment: single tiny green sprout, two small leaves, growing between rusted gears, vivid green against grey

props.name: Spark's Torso Panel
props.description: A curved metal panel that Spark detaches from its own body to shield the flower.
props.continuityNotes: Before detachment: flush with Spark's torso. After: used as a tiny lean-to shelter over the flower. The detachment reveals wiring underneath — Spark's sacrifice is visible.

scenes.name: Sacrifice
scenes.description: Spark shields the flower with its own body panel.

scenes.name: Light
scenes.description: Sunlight breaks through. Spark rests beside the sheltered flower.

shots.name: Junkyard Wide
shots.description: Extreme wide establishing shot of the junkyard.

cinematicSpec.framing: Spark is a tiny glint in the lower third of a vast landscape

shots.name: Spark Walking
shots.description: Medium tracking shot following Spark through the debris.

cinematicSpec.compositionNotes: Spark centered, background bokeh reveals scale of junkyard

shots.continuityNotes: Spark's eye-light is dim amber — listless, without purpose.

shots.name: Spark Sees Flower
shots.description: Close-up of Spark's eye pivoting downward, then rack focus to the sprout.

cinematicSpec.framing: Spark's eye sharp foreground, flower blurred background, then rack to flower sharp

shots.continuityNotes: Spark's eye-light shifts from dim amber to warm gold during this shot.

shots.name: Spark Leans In
shots.description: Low angle looking up at Spark leaning toward the flower, head tilting.

cinematicSpec.framing: Flower foreground bottom frame, Spark looming gently above

shots.name: Debris Falls
shots.description: Wide-to-medium: metal chunk falls, Spark looks up in alarm.

cinematicSpec.framing: Spark and flower in lower frame, debris entering from above

shots.name: Panel Detach
shots.description: Close-up: Spark detaches its torso panel and shields the flower.

cinematicSpec.framing: Tight on Spark's hands detaching the panel, exposed wiring visible, sparks fly

shots.continuityNotes: The CLICK of detachment must be audible. Spark flinches — this costs something.

shots.name: Sunbeam
shots.description: Close-up of light hitting the flower, then widening to include Spark.

cinematicSpec.framing: Flower and panel-shelter in golden light, Spark settling beside

shots.name: Pullback Reveal
shots.description: Slow pullback revealing Spark and flower as a tiny point of warmth in the vast junkyard. Fade out.

cinematicSpec.framing: Mirror of shot 0101 but now with a single point of golden warmth in the grey landscape

lighting.style: single shaft of golden light in overcast

shots.continuityNotes: This mirrors shot-0101 compositionally but the mood has transformed. The audience should feel the contrast.

styleGuides.name: Pixar House Style
styleGuides.description: Core visual style rules for Pixar-quality rendering.

guidelines.cameraLanguage: Motivated camera movement. Every move reveals or emphasizes emotion.
guidelines.editingLanguage: Slow dissolves. Let moments breathe. No cuts faster than 1.5 seconds.

styleGuides.negativeStylePrompt: flat shading, anime style, low-poly, wireframe, uncanny valley human faces, photorealistic humans, stock footage, 2D cel animation
